parameters.query: =SELECT cb.*, k.keyword as target_keyword, k.search_volume, c.domain, c.name as client_name FROM content_briefs cb LEFT JOIN keywords k ON cb.target_keyword_id = k.id JOIN clients c ON cb.client_id = c.id WHERE cb.id = '{{$json.body.briefId}}'
=UPDATE content_briefs SET status = 'in_progress', updated_at = now() WHERE id = '{{$json.body.briefId}}'

=INSERT INTO content_articles (brief_id, client_id, title, slug, body, meta_title, meta_description, word_count, seo_score, status, llm_model) VALUES ('{{$json.brief_id}}', '{{$json.client_id}}', '{{$json.title}}', '{{$json.slug}}', '{{$json.body}}', '{{$json.meta_title}}', '{{$json.meta_description}}', {{$json.word_count}}, {{$json.seo_score}}, 'review', 'gpt-4o') RETURNING id

=INSERT INTO agent_action_log (client_id, module, action_type, summary, details, status, triggered_by) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', 'content', 'article_generated', 'Generated article: "{{$json.title}}" ({{$json.word_count}} words, SEO score: {{$json.seo_score}})', '{"brief_id": "{{$json.brief_id}}", "word_count": {{$json.word_count}}, "seo_score": {{$json.seo_score}}}', 'success', 'n8n-content-generator')
